rationale: Review 2's fixes are circular: fiberHomeomorph_one and fiberHomeomorph_mul are themselves proved via fiberHomeomorphMonoidHom.map_one/map_mul, so substituting them back as proofs of those fields would be self-referential. Review 1 correctly points to the underlying pointwise API from the imported Deck file as the non-circular fix, and additionally catches the analogous fragility in the MulAction instance at line 89 that Review 2 misses.
